name: bexlogs-scraper
description: Headless Playwright worker that scrapes BookingExperts logs and posts batches to the BexLogs Laravel API.

scripts.test: tsx scripts/parse-fixtures.ts && tsx scripts/heartbeat-ticker-test.ts && tsx scripts/load-more-retry-test.ts && tsx scripts/load-more-signin-retry-test.ts && tsx scripts/token-echo-retry-test.ts
